title: The Eternal Return of Antonis Paraskevas
original_title: Η Αιώνια Επιστροφή του Αντώνη Παρασκευά
overview: Antonis arrives at a hotel resort by the sea. It is wintertime, the hotel is closed and Antonis drifts around alone. He has a lot of time to kill. Until television announces the disappearance of the famous TV host Antonis Paraskevas…
